title: Instrument Kill Week
scientificQuestion: Can runtime reproduction alignment distinguish real repository runtime reproducibility from static tests/docs evidence?
humanReadableSummary: Attacked calibration, blind execution, controls, counterexamples, mutations, and replay evidence. The instrument survived as useful but not validation-ready.
disclaimer: Bounded computational repository reproduction instrument result only. It does not claim external validation, breakthrough discovery, universal reproducibility, legal validity, medical validity, unsafe capability, or external adoption.
